title: claytonia breweri
intro: Claytonia breweri, also known as Brewer's wintergrass or miner's lettuce, is a perennial herb native to the western regions of North America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Claytonia breweri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine and as a nutritious addition to salads.
